mapper.insert: INSERT INTO editor_asset (owner_id, document_id, kind, filename, mime_type, bucket, storage_key, file_size, width, height, sha256) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{documentId}, #{kind}, #{filename}, #{mimeType}, #{bucket}, #{storageKey}, #{fileSize}, #{width}, #{height}, #{sha256})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, document_id, kind, filename, mime_type, bucket, storage_key, file_size, width, height, sha256, created_at, deleted_at FROM editor_asset WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
